title: The Moon Mod
description: This mod adds cool new moon-related items to Minecraft!
body:
This mod adds cool new moon-related items to Minecraft!
Turn a villager into a Moonologer by giving it an enchanting table.
Please note that most of the Moonologer's trades require diamonds.
There are also some new crafting recipes.

- As long as you hold the night vision charm, you have night vision.
- When you right-click the Staff Of Tides, a big pool of water forms around you.
- When you right-click the Black Moon Pendant, all mobs around you in a 6-block radius (not     including yourself) get slowness 3 and weakness 3 for 30 seconds.
- When you right-click the Lightning Healer, you get regeneration 255 for 2 seconds.
- When you right-click the Starlight Dust, all mobs around you in a 6-block radius (not including yourself) levitate up to the sky and never come down.
- When you right-click the Crescent Cloak, you disappear for 3 minutes.
- When you right-click the Moonveil Ring, you get Speed 3 and Strength 3 for 3 minutes.
- When you right-click the Moonlihgt Feather, you get Feather Falling 3 for 30 seconds.
- When you right-click the Moonbound Eye, all mobs in a 20-block radius of you (but not yourself) glow for 30 seconds.
- When you right-click the Lunar Lullaby Shell, all mobs in a 6-block radius (not including yourself) get Slowness 7 for 30 seconds.
- When you hold right-click with the Thread Of The Moonweaver in your hand, a bridge of magic moon blocks spawns under your feet.
